lineId.description: Unique identifier for this commitment line within the contract. Assigned by BAP at select. Persists through the contract lifecycle. Used to reference specific lines in updates, cancellations, returns.

resourceId.description: ID of the resource being committed. References beckn:Resource.id from the catalog. For VARIANT resources, this is the specific variant ID, not the parent.

offerId.description: ID of the offer under which this resource is being committed. References beckn:Offer.id from the catalog.

quantity.description: Quantity of this resource being committed.

measure.description: Weight or volume measure for continuous items

price.description: Locked price for this commitment line as agreed at select. Price is fixed at on_select and does not change unless a mid-transaction-changes variant is triggered.

customisationSelections.description: Buyer's selections from customisationGroups for COMPOSED and WITH_EXTRAS resources. One entry per group selected.

groupId.description: ID of the customisationGroup selected from

optionId.description: ID of the option selected within the group

priceDelta.description: Price delta applied by this selection

customisationSelections.x-ion-condition: Required for COMPOSED and WITH_EXTRAS resources

specialInstructions.description: Per-line buyer note. e.g. "Extra crispy base", "No onion", "Gift wrap this item separately". Visible to seller at fulfilment.
